resources.name: SCEP SPEC-011 Dataset Export Acceptance
resources.description: Self-contained SPEC-011 acceptance flow. Confirm request 01 with the persisted local administrator credentials, then run all requests in numeric order to generate source data, create asynchronous exports for every dataset type, download CSV and Parquet ZIP artifacts, and validate metadata, events, authorization, errors, OpenAPI and metrics.

resources.name: SPEC-011 Automated Dataset Export
resources.description: Run all 29 requests in numeric order. Four asynchronous exports cover all dataset types, both profiles and both formats. Poll requests wait two seconds for the MVP background task before asserting completion. If a very slow machine is still processing, rerun only that poll and its following download before continuing.

resources.name: 01 - Login Administrator and Initialize Run
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('administrator login returns 200', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code, '401: update admin_email/admin_password to the persisted local administrator credentials').to.eql(200));
if (insomnia.response.code === 200) insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('admin_token', insomnia.response.json().access_token);

resources.name: 02 - Create Dataset Export Facility

body.text:
{
  "name": "SPEC-011 Dataset Export {{ _.run_id }}",
  "facility_type": "University",
  "timezone": "{{ _.timezone }}",
  "country": "Brazil",
  "city": "Juiz de Fora",
  "address": "Dataset Export acceptance",
  "status": "Active"
}

resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('facility creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));
if (insomnia.response.code === 201) insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('facility_id', insomnia.response.json().id);

resources.name: 03 - Create Station and Connector
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('station creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));
if (insomnia.response.code === 201) { const body = insomnia.response.json(); insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('station_id', body.id); insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('connector_id', body.connectors[0].id); }

resources.name: 04 - Create EV Driver
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('driver creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));
if (insomnia.response.code === 201) insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('driver_id', insomnia.response.json().id);

resources.name: 05 - Login EV Driver
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('driver login returns 200', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));
if (insomnia.response.code === 200) insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('driver_token', insomnia.response.json().access_token);

resources.name: 06 - Create Vehicle
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('vehicle creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));
if (insomnia.response.code === 201) insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('vehicle_id', insomnia.response.json().id);

resources.name: 07 - Create Near-Term Reservation
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('reservation creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));
if (insomnia.response.code === 201) insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('reservation_id', insomnia.response.json().reservation.id);

resources.name: 08 - Activate Charging Session
resources.afterResponseScript:
insomnia.test('session activation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));
if (insomnia.response.code === 201) { const body = insomnia.response.json(); const first = new Date(new Date(body.started_at).getTime() + 1000); insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('session_id', body.id); insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('recorded_at_1', first.toISOString()); insomnia.baseEnvironment.set('recorded_at_2', new Date(first.getTime() + 1000).toISOString()); }

resources.name: 09 - Add First Telemetry Sample
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('first telemetry ingestion returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));

resources.name: 10 - Add Second Telemetry Sample
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('second telemetry ingestion returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));

resources.name: 11 - Create Research Telemetry CSV Export A
12 - Poll Research Telemetry Export A
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('research export A completed with its retained artifact', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status, 'If still PROCESSING on a slow machine, rerun this poll').to.eql('COMPLETED'); insomnia.expect(body.row_count).to.eql(2); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_available).to.eql(true); insomnia.expect(body.data_cutoff_at).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.data_file_sha256).to.have.length(64); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_sha256).to.have.length(64); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_expires_at).to.be.a('string'); });

resources.name: 13 - Download Research Telemetry CSV ZIP A
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('research CSV ZIP A downloads successfully', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));

resources.name: 14 - Create Identical Research Telemetry CSV Export B
15 - Poll Research Telemetry Export B
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('research export B completed with its retained artifact', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status, 'If still PROCESSING on a slow machine, rerun this poll').to.eql('COMPLETED'); insomnia.expect(body.row_count).to.eql(2); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_available).to.eql(true); });

resources.name: 16 - Download Research Telemetry CSV ZIP B
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('research CSV ZIP B downloads successfully', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));

resources.name: 17 - Create Administrative Sessions Parquet Export
18 - Poll Administrative Sessions Export
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('sessions Parquet export completed', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status, 'If still PROCESSING on a slow machine, rerun this poll').to.eql('COMPLETED'); insomnia.expect(body.dataset_category).to.eql('OPERATIONAL'); insomnia.expect(body.row_count).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_available).to.eql(true); });

resources.name: 19 - Download Administrative Sessions Parquet ZIP
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('administrative Parquet ZIP downloads successfully', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));

resources.name: 20 - Create Research Occupancy CSV Export
21 - Poll Research Occupancy Export
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('occupancy export completed from a cutoff-bound projection', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.status, 'If still PROCESSING on a slow machine, rerun this poll').to.eql('COMPLETED'); insomnia.expect(body.dataset_category).to.eql('ANALYTICAL'); insomnia.expect(body.row_count).to.be.greaterThan(0); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_available).to.eql(true); insomnia.expect(body.filters.granularity).to.eql('hour'); insomnia.expect(body.filters.timezone).to.eql(insomnia.baseEnvironment.get('timezone')); });

resources.name: 22 - Download Research Occupancy CSV ZIP
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('analytical occupancy CSV ZIP downloads successfully', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200));

resources.name: 23 - List Completed Dataset Exports
24 - Inspect Completed Export Metadata
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('detail preserves lifecycle and reproducibility metadata', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.id).to.eql(insomnia.baseEnvironment.get('sessions_export_id')); insomnia.expect(body.status).to.eql('COMPLETED'); insomnia.expect(body.schema_version).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.data_cutoff_at).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.completed_at).to.be.a('string'); insomnia.expect(body.failure_code).to.eql(null); insomnia.expect(body.failure_message).to.eql(null); insomnia.expect(body.artifact_available).to.eql(true); });

resources.name: 25 - Observe DatasetExportCompleted Event
26 - EV Driver Cannot List Dataset Exports
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('EV Driver receives the documented 403', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(403); insomnia.expect(body.detail).to.eql('insufficient permission'); });

resources.name: 27 - Reject Invalid Export Window
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('invalid half-open window returns 400', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(400); insomnia.expect(body.detail).to.include('from must be earlier than to'); });

resources.name: 28 - Verify Dataset Export OpenAPI Contract
29 - Verify Dataset Export Metrics
resources.afterResponseScript:
const text = insomnia.response.text();
insomnia.test('SPEC-011 Prometheus metrics are exposed', () => { ['scep_dataset_export_requests_total','scep_dataset_export_outcomes_total','scep_dataset_export_failures_total','scep_dataset_export_processing_duration_seconds','scep_dataset_export_pending_duration_seconds','scep_dataset_export_generated_rows','scep_dataset_export_artifact_size_bytes','scep_dataset_exports_currently_processing','scep_dataset_export_expired_artifacts_total','scep_dataset_export_storage_failures_total','scep_dataset_export_downloads_total'].forEach(name => insomnia.expect(text).to.include(name)); });
